situation: Software engineer with a job offer at a Munich startup. Annual gross salary was €44,500, which fell below the 2026 Blue Card threshold of €45,552. HR had not accounted for the annual threshold adjustment.
rejection_reason: Salary offer did not meet the minimum annual gross salary threshold for Blue Card under §18b AufenthG. KVR required the salary to meet or exceed the current BMAS-set threshold.
what_worked: Negotiated a salary adjustment with the employer to €46,000 gross. New employment contract submitted to KVR. Processing resumed and Blue Card was issued 3 weeks later.
what_failed: Arguing that a variable bonus would push total compensation above the threshold. Offering to show bank statements from the home country as financial proof. Requesting exception processing as a STEM professional.
